title: The Fireman's Account
description: Dolan Marsh, leaning out of the locomotive cab, describes two figures he observed at the construction site after midnight: a well-dressed man carrying a document satchel who entered the lower office door at approximately 1:15 AM, and a lean, quick figure who worked near the drill platform around 2 AM and left before dawn. He can give you the time the lower office light went out — 1:47 AM — and confirms that the perimeter gate was not locked when the second figure left.
